prompt:
Men's realistic-scale variation 2 — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a fit warm-skinned man in his early 30s sitting at a sunlit modern cafe-style table by a tall floor-to-ceiling window, BRIGHT CLEAN DIRECT NATURAL DAYLIGHT pouring through the window from the left side of the frame. He lifts ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE between his thumb and index finger toward his slightly parted lips with a calm relaxed smile, mid-bite. He wears a fitted slate-blue henley with sleeves rolled, simple leather watch, brown stubble, sun-warmed glowing skin.

>>> THE JAR — LIT BY CLEAN BOUNCING DAYLIGHT <<<
The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar sits on the warm-wood cafe table in front of him, in the SAME bright direct daylight. The light angle creates a SHARP CLEAN SPECULAR HIGHLIGHT — a bright vertical gleam — running down the curved side of the jar's glossy black plastic. The jar's front label catches the light fully and CRISPLY — every detail of the teal/cyan and gold/yellow brand accents reads sharply with NO shadow falloff, NO diffusion, NO haze. The label IS the brightest cleanly-lit element on the table. A subtle clean reflection bounces onto the polished wood surface. Beside the jar sits a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, also in the same bright direct light. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic jar with teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible.

Background: bright airy modern cafe — soft warm-wood furniture, a glimpse of a ceramic coffee cup on the table, a single fresh sprig in a small vase, white walls, the tall window pouring in bright open daylight. Soft warm shallow depth-of-field background. NOT moody, NOT golden-hour, NOT dappled.

Lighting: BRIGHT CLEAN OPEN DAYLIGHT from the left wrapping BOTH the jar AND the man uniformly — same crisp daylight bouncing cleanly off both subject's skin and the jar's glossy plastic. NO heavy dappled shadows, NO orange tint, NO mood — just clean bright real daylight that makes the product feel REAL.

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the man seated, gummy held in the upper-third near his face, small realistic-sized jar visible in the lower-third with bright specular highlight clearly visible on its curved side.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture and stubble, sharp focus on jar with clean specular reflections, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers. Editorial men's wellness-brand feel.
